mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : ExamStareDAO.list 설 명 : 시험응시 리스트 조회 */ SELECT A.STD_ID , A.EXAM_ID , A.ACQS_TOT_SCR , A.STARE_CNT , A.STARE_TM , A.SDTTM , A.EDTTM , A.ADDNDM_CTS , A.EVL_DTTM , A.EVLYN , A.REEXAMYN , A.DELYN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE A WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.EXAM_ID = #{examCd}
mapper.sql:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY C.USERNM) AS LINE_NO , A.EXAM_ID , C.USER_ID , B.STD_ID , C.DEPT_CD , C.DEPTNM , C.USERNM , D.USER_ID , NVL(H.HSTRY_TYCD, 'SET') AS HSTRY_TYCD , NVL((SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE CTGRCD = 'HSTRY_TYCD' AND CD = H.HSTRY_TYCD AND ROWNUM = 1), '미응시') AS HSTY_TYPE_NM , H.FRST_INQ_DTTM , NVL(E.REEXAMYN, 'N') AS REEXAMYN , NVL(E.STARE_CNT, 0) AS STARE_CNT , COUNT(1) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT , E.KONAN_MAX_MOSART , E.ACQS_TOT_SCR , NVL(( SELECT SUM(AA.ACQS_SCR) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE_PAPER AA WHERE AA.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND AA.STD_ID = B.STD_ID ), 0) AS STARE_SCORE , E.SCR_MEMO , C.MOBILE_NO , C.EMAIL , NVL(E.EVLYN, 'N') AS EVLYN , NVL(B.SCYR,'-') AS SCYR , NVL(C.ENTR_YY,'-') AS ENTR_YY , NVL(C.ENTR_HY,'-') AS ENTR_HY , NVL(C.ENTR_GBN,'-') AS ENTR_GBN , NVL(C.ENTR_GBN_NM,'-') AS ENTR_GBN_NM , CASE WHEN(TO_DATE(E.SDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') + NUMTODSINTERVAL((SELECT TKEXAM_MNTS FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID), 'MINUTE') < SYSDATE) OR H.HSTRY_TYCD = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS STAER_YN , B.GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID AND CTGRCD = 'GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD' AND CD = B.GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD) AS GRSC_DEGR_CORS_GBN_NM
FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN A JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' JOIN TB_LMS_USR C ON B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT D ON C.USER_ID = D.USER_ID AND B.USER_ID = D.USER_ID AND D.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT EXAM_ID, STD_ID, HSTRY_TYCD, FRST_INQ_DTTM FROM ( SELECT EXAM_ID, STD_ID, HSTRY_TYCD, FRST_INQ_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE_HSTY HSTY ORDER BY HSTY.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) H ON H.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND H.STD_ID = B.STD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE E ON E.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND E.STD_ID = B.STD_ID WHERE A.EXAM_ID = #{examCd} AND B.AUDITYN = 'N'
AND ( LOWER(C.DEPT_CD) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(C.DEPTNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(C.USER_ID) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(C.USERNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
AND B.STD_ID IN ( SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE REEXAMYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_ID = ( SELECT EXAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND DELYN = 'N') )
AND (A.HSTRY_TYCD NOT IN ('COMPLETE', 'START', 'RESTORE') OR (A.REEXAMYN= 'Y' AND A.HSTRY_TYCD NOT IN ('COMPLETE', 'START', 'RESTORE')))
AND A.REEXAMYN = #{reExamYn}
AND A.HSTRY_TYCD IN ('COMPLETE', 'START', 'RESTORE') AND A.REEXAMYN != 'Y'
AND A.HSTRY_TYCD NOT IN ('COMPLETE', 'START', 'RESTORE') AND A.REEXAMYN != 'Y'
AND A.HSTRY_TYCD IN ('COMPLETE', 'START', 'RESTORE') AND A.REEXAMYN = 'Y'
AND A.HSTRY_TYCD NOT IN ('COMPLETE', 'START', 'RESTORE') AND A.REEXAMYN = 'Y'
AND A.EVLYN = 'Y'
AND A.EVLYN != 'Y'
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ExamStareDAO.listExamStareStd 설 명 : 시험응시 학습자 리스트 조회 */
/* SQL ID : ExamStareDAO.listExamStareStdEgov 설 명 : 시험응시 학습자 리스트 조회 */

/* SQL ID : ExamStareDAO.selectExamStareStd 설 명 : 시험응시 학습자 정보 조회 */ SELECT A.EXAM_ID , A.STD_ID , A.ACQS_TOT_SCR , C.USER_ID , C.USERNM , C.DEPTNM , A.EVLYN , A.SCR_MEMO , A.REEXAMYN , NVL((SELECT REEXAM_RFLTRT FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID), 100) AS REEXAM_RFLTRT FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE A JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT B ON A.STD_ID = B.STD_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USR C ON B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID WHERE EXAM_ID = #{examCd} AND A.STD_ID = #{stdNo}

/* SQL ID : ExamStareDAO.listExamNonStare 설 명 : 시험 미응시 리스트 조회 */ SELECT A.STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE B ON A.STD_ID = B.STD_ID AND B.EXAM_ID = #{examCd} WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N' AND B.STD_ID IS NULL
mapper.update:
/* SQL ID : ExamStareDAO.updateReExamStareByStdNo 설 명 : 학습자별 재시험 설정 */
MERGE INTO TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE T USING ( SELECT #{stdNo} AS STD_ID , #{examCd} AS EXAM_ID , #{stareSn} AS STARE_SN , 0 AS STARE_CNT , #{stareTm} AS STARE_TM , NULL AS SDTTM , NULL AS EDTTM , NULL AS ADDNDM_CTS , NULL AS EVL_DTTM , 'N' AS EVLYN , #{reExamYn} AS REEXAMYN , 'N' AS DELYN , #{rgtrId} AS RGTR_ID , #{mdfrId} AS MDFR_ID FROM DUAL ) S ON (T.STD_ID = S.STD_ID AND T.EXAM_ID = S.EXAM_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.STARE_SN = S.STARE_SN , T.STARE_CNT = S.STARE_CNT , T.STARE_TM = S.STARE_TM , T.SDTTM = S.SDTTM , T.EDTTM = S.EDTTM , T.ADDNDM_CTS = S.ADDNDM_CTS , T.EVL_DTTM = S.EVL_DTTM , T.EVLYN = S.EVLYN , T.REEXAMYN = S.REEXAMYN , T.DELYN = S.DELYN , T.RGTR_ID = S.RGTR_ID , T.FRST_INQ_DTTM = FN_DTTM() , T.MDFR_ID = S.MDFR_ID , T.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( STD_ID , EXAM_ID , STARE_SN , STARE_CNT , STARE_TM , SDTTM , EDTTM , ADDNDM_CTS , EVL_DTTM , EVLYN , REEXAMYN , DELYN , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM ) VALUES ( S.STD_ID , S.EXAM_ID , S.STARE_SN , S.STARE_CNT , S.STARE_TM , S.SDTTM , S.EDTTM , S.ADDNDM_CTS , S.EVL_DTTM , S.EVLYN , S.REEXAMYN , S.DELYN , S.RGTR_ID , FN_DTTM() , S.MDFR_ID , FN_DTTM() )

/* SQL ID : ExamStareDAO.updateExamStart 설 명 : 시험 응시 시작 */
UPDATE TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE A SET A.MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId}, A.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM(),
A.SDTTM = CASE WHEN #{stareTm} IS NOT NULL AND #{stareTm} = -1 THEN NVL(A.SDTTM, FN_DTTM()) ELSE A.SDTTM END,
A.STARE_TM = CASE WHEN #{stareTm} IS NOT NULL AND #{stareTm} = 1 THEN ROUND( (SYSDATE - NVL(TO_DATE(A.SDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), SYSDATE)) * 86400 ) ELSE A.STARE_TM END
WHERE A.EXAM_ID = #{examCd} AND A.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND A.DELYN = 'N'
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ExamStareDAO.selectExamStdStareInfo 설 명 : 시험 응시 가능여부 등의 정보 조회 */ SELECT NVL(B.MAX_TKEXAM_CNT, 9999) - A.STARE_CNT AS leftCnt , CASE WHEN B.EXAM_EXPSR_TYCD = 'LEFT' THEN CASE WHEN B.EXAM_ALLOC_TYCD = 'WHOLE' THEN B.TKEXAM_MNTS * 60 - NVL(A.STARE_TM, 0) ELSE LEAST((TO_DATE(CASE WHEN A.REEXAMYN = 'Y' THEN B.RE_EXAM_END_DTTM ELSE B.EXAM_EDTTM END, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400, B.TKEXAM_MNTS * 60 - NVL(A.STARE_TM, 0)) END ELSE NVL(A.STARE_TM, 0) END AS stareTm , B.TKEXAM_MNTS * 60 - NVL(A.STARE_TM, 0) AS leftTm , A.SDTTM AS startDttm , A.EDTTM AS endDttm , CASE WHEN A.REEXAMYN = 'Y' THEN CASE WHEN FN_DTTM() BETWEEN B.RE_EXAM_START_DTTM AND B.RE_EXAM_END_DTTM THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ELSE CASE WHEN FN_DTTM() BETWEEN B.EXAM_SDTTM AND B.EXAM_EDTTM THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END END AS starePeriodYn FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID WHERE A.EXAM_ID = #{examCd} AND A.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND A.DELYN = 'N'

/* SQL ID : ExamStareDAO.listExamStareStdPageing 설 명 : 시험응시 학습자 리스트 조회 */ WITH STD_T AS ( SELECT #{stdNos} AS STD_ID FROM DUAL ) , COPY_T(N) AS ( SELECT 1 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT N + 1 FROM COPY_T, STD_T
WHERE N <= LENGTH(STD_ID) - LENGTH(REPLACE(STD_ID, ',', ''))
)
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY C.USERNM) AS LINE_NO , A.EXAM_ID , A.ACQS_TOT_SCR , A.ACQS_TOT_SCR AS EVL_SCR , NVL(( SELECT SUM(AA.ACQS_SCR) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE_PAPER AA WHERE AA.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND AA.STD_ID = A.STD_ID), 0) AS STARE_SCORE , A.EVLYN , A.STD_ID , B.USER_ID , C.USERNM , C.DEPTNM , D.USER_ID , (SELECT CASE WHEN AA.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' THEN CASE WHEN A.STARE_CNT > 0 THEN 'C' ELSE 'N' END ELSE CASE WHEN A.SDTTM IS NULL THEN 'N' WHEN A.EDTTM IS NULL THEN 'T' WHEN A.EDTTM IS NOT NULL THEN 'C' END END FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA WHERE AA.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID) AS STARE_STATUS_CD , A.SDTTM , A.EDTTM , A.EVL_DTTM , A.REEXAMYN , A.STARE_CNT , A.STARE_TM , CASE WHEN T.STD_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CHECK_YN , C.MOBILE_NO , C.EMAIL , NVL(B.SCYR, '-') AS SCYR , NVL(C.ENTR_YY,'-') AS ENTR_YY , NVL(C.ENTR_HY,'-') AS ENTR_HY , NVL(C.ENTR_GBN_NM,'-') AS ENTR_GBN_NM FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE A JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT B ON A.STD_ID = B.STD_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = (SELECT SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN WHERE EXAM_ID = #{examCd}) JOIN TB_LMS_USR C ON B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT D ON C.USER_ID = D.USER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_SUBSTR(STD_ID, '[^,]+', 1, N)AS STD_ID FROM COPY_T, STD_T ) T ON A.STD_ID = T.STD_ID WHERE A.EXAM_ID = #{examCd} AND A.DELYN = 'N'
AND A.EDTTM IS NOT NULL
AND ( A.SDTTM IS NULL OR A.EDTTM IS NULL )
AND (C.USERNM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%') COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci OR C.DEPTNM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%') COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci OR D.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%') ) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci
AND T.STD_ID IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY C.USERNM

/* SQL ID : ExamStareDAO.listExamStareStatus 설 명 : 중간 기말 수시 참여 현황 목록 */
SELECT Z.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY Z.USERNM) AS LINE_NO FROM ( WITH STDNOS AS ( SELECT #{stdNos} AS STD_ID FROM DUAL )
, LIST_STD AS ( SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR(STD_ID, '[^,]+', 1, LEVEL) AS STD_ID FROM STDNOS CONNECT BY LEVEL <= REGEXP_COUNT(STD_ID, ',') + 1 )
, EXAM AS ( SELECT C.STD_ID , A.EXAM_ID , A.EXAM_TYCD , A.TKEXAM_TYCD , CASE WHEN D.ACQS_TOT_SCR IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS EVLYN
, CASE A.EXAM_TYCD WHEN 'EXAM' THEN CASE WHEN D.STARE_CNT IS NOT NULL AND D.STARE_CNT > 0 THEN TO_CHAR(NVL(D.ACQS_TOT_SCR, 0)) ELSE NULL END END AS SCR , TO_CHAR( CASE A.EXAM_TYCD WHEN 'EXAM' THEN CASE WHEN A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID IS NOT NULL AND NVL((SELECT 'Y' FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE STD_ID = C.STD_ID AND EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND REEXAMYN = 'Y'), 'N') = 'Y' THEN NVL(TO_CHAR(G.ACQS_TOT_SCR), NVL(TO_CHAR(E.SCR), NVL(TO_CHAR(F.SCR), 'N'))) END WHEN 'QUIZ' THEN NVL(TO_CHAR(G.ACQS_TOT_SCR), 'N') WHEN 'ASMNT' THEN NVL(TO_CHAR(E.SCR), 'N') WHEN 'FORUM' THEN NVL(TO_CHAR(F.SCR), 'N') END ) AS ACQS_TOT_SCR , (SELECT ASMT_ID FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N' UNION ALL SELECT DSCS_ID FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N' UNION ALL SELECT EXAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') AS EXAM_SBST_REF_ID , F.APRV_STSCD FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT C ON B.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND C.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND C.AUDITYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE D ON A.EXAM_ID = D.EXAM_ID AND C.STD_ID = D.STD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN E ON A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = E.ASMT_ID AND C.STD_ID = E.STD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP F ON A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = F.DSCS_ID AND C.STD_ID = F.STD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE G ON A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = G.EXAM_ID AND C.STD_ID = G.STD_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT STD_ID, EXAM_ID, APRV_STSCD FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY STD_ID, EXAM_ID ORDER BY MOD_DTTM DESC) AS RN, STD_ID, EXAM_ID, APRV_STSCD FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE) WHERE RN = 1 )F ON F.STD_ID = C.STD_ID AND F.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND A.EXAM_ID IN
#{item}
)
SELECT A.USER_ID , B.DEPTNM , B.USERNM , A.STD_ID , B.MOBILE_NO , B.EMAIL , NVL(A.SCYR, '-') AS SCYR , NVL(B.ENTR_YY, '-') AS ENTR_YY , NVL(B.ENTR_HY, '-') AS ENTR_HY , NVL(B.ENTR_GBN_NM, '-') AS ENTR_GBN_NM , ( SELECT EVLYN FROM EXAM WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' AND EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM') AS MID_EVAL_YN , ( SELECT EVLYN FROM EXAM WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' AND EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM') AS END_EVAL_YN , NVL(( SELECT CASE WHEN SCR = 'N' THEN '미응시' ELSE SCR END FROM EXAM WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' AND EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' ), '-') AS MID_SCORE , NVL(( SELECT CASE WHEN ACQS_TOT_SCR = 'N' THEN '미응시' ELSE ACQS_TOT_SCR END FROM EXAM WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' AND EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND EXAM_SBST_REF_ID IS NOT NULL ), '-') AS MID_REPLACE_SCORE , NVL(( SELECT CASE WHEN ACQS_TOT_SCR = 'N' THEN '미응시' ELSE ACQS_TOT_SCR END FROM EXAM WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' AND EXAM_TYCD <> 'EXAM' ), '-') AS MID_ETC_SCORE , ( SELECT CASE WHEN SCR IS NULL THEN ACQS_TOT_SCR ELSE SCR END FROM EXAM WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M') AS MID_STARE_YN , NVL(( SELECT CASE WHEN SCR = 'N' THEN '미응시' ELSE SCR END FROM EXAM WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' AND EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' ), '-') AS END_SCORE , NVL(( SELECT CASE WHEN ACQS_TOT_SCR = 'N' THEN '미응시' ELSE ACQS_TOT_SCR END FROM EXAM WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' AND EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND EXAM_SBST_REF_ID IS NOT NULL ), '-') AS END_REPLACE_SCORE , NVL(( SELECT CASE WHEN ACQS_TOT_SCR = 'N' THEN '미응시' ELSE ACQS_TOT_SCR END FROM EXAM WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' AND EXAM_TYCD <> 'EXAM' ), '-') AS END_ETC_SCORE , ( SELECT CASE WHEN SCR IS NULL THEN ACQS_TOT_SCR ELSE SCR END FROM EXAM WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L') AS END_STARE_YN , NVL(( SELECT CASE WHEN SCR = 'N' THEN '미응시' ELSE SCR END FROM EXAM WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND TKEXAM_TYCD = 'A' AND EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' ), '-') AS ADMISSION_SCORE , NVL(( SELECT CASE WHEN ACQS_TOT_SCR = 'N' THEN '미응시' ELSE ACQS_TOT_SCR END FROM EXAM WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND TKEXAM_TYCD = 'A' AND EXAM_TYCD <> 'EXAM'), '-') AS ADMISSION_ETC_SCORE , ( SELECT CASE WHEN SCR IS NULL THEN ACQS_TOT_SCR ELSE SCR END FROM EXAM WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND TKEXAM_TYCD = 'A') AS ADM_STARE_YN , NVL(( SELECT APRV_STSCD FROM EXAM WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' AND EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' ), '-') AS MID_APPR_STAT , NVL(( SELECT APRV_STSCD FROM EXAM WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' AND EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' ), '-') AS APRV_STSCD
FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_USR B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID LEFT JOIN LIST_STD T ON A.STD_ID = T.STD_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD NOT IN ('D', 'T') AND A.AUDITYN = 'N'
AND ( LOWER(B.USERNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(B.USER_ID) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(B.DEPTNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
AND T.STD_ID IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY B.USERNM ) Z WHERE 1 = 1
AND (
(Z.MID_STARE_YN IS NOT NULL AND Z.MID_STARE_YN <> 'N') OR (Z.END_STARE_YN IS NOT NULL AND Z.END_STARE_YN <> 'N') OR (Z.ADM_STARE_YN IS NOT NULL AND Z.ADM_STARE_YN <> 'N')
(Z.MID_STARE_YN IS NOT NULL AND Z.MID_STARE_YN = 'N') OR (Z.END_STARE_YN IS NOT NULL AND Z.END_STARE_YN = 'N') OR (Z.ADM_STARE_YN IS NOT NULL AND Z.ADM_STARE_YN = 'N')
)

/* SQL ID : ExamStareDAO.listReExamStd 설 명 : 실시간 시험 미응시 학생 목록 */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.DEPTNM, A.USERNM) AS LINE_NO , A.* FROM (
) A

/* SQL ID : ExamStareDAO.listReExamConfigStatus 설 명 : 실시간 시험 재시험 등록현황 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.SBJCTNM , A.CRS_ID , A.DVCLAS_NO , A.UNIV_CD , A.DEPT_CD , A.DEPTNM , A.USERNM , C.EXAM_ID , C.RE_EXAM_START_DTTM , C.RE_EXAM_STARE_TM , C.DSBL_ADD_TM , C.TKEXAM_TYCD , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = C.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID IN ( SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AA JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT BB ON AA.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID AND BB.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID ) AND DELYN = 'N' AND REEXAMYN = 'Y' AND SDTTM IS NULL ) AS RE_EXAM_STD_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.SBJCTNM , A.CRS_ID , A.DVCLAS_NO , A.UNIV_CD , A.DEPT_CD , (SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_HOME_USER_DEPT_CD WHERE DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ORG_ID = #{orgId}) AS DEPTNM , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = C.USER_ID) AS USERNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.CRS_SMSTR_ID = #{termCd} LEFT JOIN SBJCT_PROF C ON A.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND C.RPRSYN = 'Y' WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.UNIV_CD, A.SBJCTNM, A.DVCLAS_NO ) A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC C ON B.EXAM_ID = C.EXAM_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' AND C.USEYN = 'Y' AND C.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND C.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND C.TKEXAM_TYCD IN ('M', 'L') AND C.REEXAMYN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.UNIV_CD, A.SBJCTNM, A.DVCLAS_NO, C.TKEXAM_TYCD DESC
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : ExamStareDAO.resetReExamStare 설 명 : 시험 재시험 설정 취소 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE SET MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId} , MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() , STARE_TM = 0 , REEXAMYN = 'N' WHERE EXAM_ID = #{examCd} AND REEXAMYN = 'Y'
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ExamStareDAO.selectHaksaYear 설 명 : 학사 년도 조회 */ SELECT DISTINCT TLT.DGRS_YR FROM CRS_SMSTR TLT ORDER BY DGRS_YR DESC

/* SQL ID : ExamStareDAO.selectHaksaTerm 설 명 : 학사 학기 조회 */ SELECT DISTINCT DGRS_SMSTR AS HAKSA_TERM_CD , ( SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE TOC WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND CTGRCD = 'DGRS_SMSTR' AND TOC.CD = TLT.DGRS_SMSTR) AS HAKSA_TERM_NM , NOW_SMSTRYN FROM CRS_SMSTR TLT WHERE DGRS_YR = #{haksaYear} ORDER BY HAKSA_TERM_CD

/* SQL ID : ExamStareDAO.selectLessonSchedule 설 명 : 차시 및 날짜 조회 */ SELECT MIN(ONE_WEEK_END_DT) AS ONE_WEEK_END_DT , MIN(TWO_WEEK_END_DT) AS TWO_WEEK_END_DT , MIN(THREE_WEEK_END_DT) AS THREE_WEEK_END_DT , MIN(FOUR_WEEK_END_DT) AS FOUR_WEEK_END_DT , MIN(FIVE_WEEK_END_DT) AS FIVE_WEEK_END_DT , MIN(SIX_WEEK_END_DT) AS SIX_WEEK_END_DT , MIN(SEVEN_WEEK_END_DT) AS SEVEN_WEEK_END_DT , MIN(EIGHT_WEEK_END_DT) AS EIGHT_WEEK_END_DT , MIN(NINE_WEEK_END_DT) AS NINE_WEEK_END_DT , MIN(TEN_WEEK_END_DT) AS TEN_WEEK_END_DT , MIN(ELEVEN_WEEK_END_DT) AS ELEVEN_WEEK_END_DT , MIN(TWELVE_WEEK_END_DT) AS TWELVE_WEEK_END_DT , MIN(THIRTEEN_WEEK_END_DT) AS THIRTEEN_WEEK_END_DT , MIN(FOURTEEN_WEEK_END_DT) AS FOURTEEN_WEEK_END_DT , MIN(FIFTEEN_WEEK_END_DT) AS FIFTEEN_WEEK_END_DT FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN LCTR_SCHDLNM = '1주차' THEN LCTR_EYMD END ONE_WEEK_END_DT , CASE WHEN LCTR_SCHDLNM = '2주차' THEN LCTR_EYMD END TWO_WEEK_END_DT , CASE WHEN LCTR_SCHDLNM = '3주차' THEN LCTR_EYMD END THREE_WEEK_END_DT , CASE WHEN LCTR_SCHDLNM = '4주차' THEN LCTR_EYMD END FOUR_WEEK_END_DT , CASE WHEN LCTR_SCHDLNM = '5주차' THEN LCTR_EYMD END FIVE_WEEK_END_DT , CASE WHEN LCTR_SCHDLNM = '6주차' THEN LCTR_EYMD END SIX_WEEK_END_DT , CASE WHEN LCTR_SCHDLNM = '7주차' THEN LCTR_EYMD END SEVEN_WEEK_END_DT , CASE WHEN LCTR_SCHDLNM = '8주차' THEN LCTR_EYMD END EIGHT_WEEK_END_DT , CASE WHEN LCTR_SCHDLNM = '9주차' THEN LCTR_EYMD END NINE_WEEK_END_DT , CASE WHEN LCTR_SCHDLNM = '10주차' THEN LCTR_EYMD END TEN_WEEK_END_DT , CASE WHEN LCTR_SCHDLNM = '11주차' THEN LCTR_EYMD END ELEVEN_WEEK_END_DT , CASE WHEN LCTR_SCHDLNM = '12주차' THEN LCTR_EYMD END TWELVE_WEEK_END_DT , CASE WHEN LCTR_SCHDLNM = '13주차' THEN LCTR_EYMD END THIRTEEN_WEEK_END_DT , CASE WHEN LCTR_SCHDLNM = '14주차' THEN LCTR_EYMD END FOURTEEN_WEEK_END_DT , CASE WHEN LCTR_SCHDLNM = '15주차' THEN LCTR_EYMD END FIFTEEN_WEEK_END_DT FROM (SELECT LCTR_SCHDLNM , CONCAT('(~ ', DATE_FORMAT(LCTR_EYMD, '%m.%d'), ')') AS LCTR_EYMD FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ = 1 AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} UNION ALL SELECT LCTR_SCHDLNM , CONCAT('(~ ', DATE_FORMAT(LCTR_EYMD, '%m.%d'), ')') AS LCTR_EYMD FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ = 2 AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} UNION ALL SELECT LCTR_SCHDLNM , CONCAT('(~ ', DATE_FORMAT(LCTR_EYMD, '%m.%d'), ')') AS LCTR_EYMD FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ = 3 AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} UNION ALL SELECT LCTR_SCHDLNM , CONCAT('(~ ', DATE_FORMAT(LCTR_EYMD, '%m.%d'), ')') AS LCTR_EYMD FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ = 4 AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} UNION ALL SELECT LCTR_SCHDLNM , CONCAT('(~ ', DATE_FORMAT(LCTR_EYMD, '%m.%d'), ')') AS LCTR_EYMD FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ = 5 AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} UNION ALL SELECT LCTR_SCHDLNM , CONCAT('(~ ', DATE_FORMAT(LCTR_EYMD, '%m.%d'), ')') AS LCTR_EYMD FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ = 6 AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} UNION ALL SELECT LCTR_SCHDLNM , CONCAT('(~ ', DATE_FORMAT(LCTR_EYMD, '%m.%d'), ')') AS LCTR_EYMD FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ = 7 AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} UNION ALL SELECT LCTR_SCHDLNM , CONCAT('(~ ', DATE_FORMAT(LCTR_EYMD, '%m.%d'), ')') AS LCTR_EYMD FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ = 8 AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} UNION ALL SELECT LCTR_SCHDLNM , CONCAT('~ ', DATE_FORMAT(LCTR_EYMD, '%m.%d'), ')') AS LCTR_EYMD FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ = 9 AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} UNION ALL SELECT LCTR_SCHDLNM , CONCAT('(~ ', DATE_FORMAT(LCTR_EYMD, '%m.%d'), ')') AS LCTR_EYMD FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ = 10 AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} UNION ALL SELECT LCTR_SCHDLNM , CONCAT('(~ ', DATE_FORMAT(LCTR_EYMD, '%m.%d'), ')') AS LCTR_EYMD FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ = 11 AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} UNION ALL SELECT LCTR_SCHDLNM , CONCAT('(~ ', DATE_FORMAT(LCTR_EYMD, '%m.%d'), ')') AS LCTR_EYMD FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ = 12 AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} UNION ALL SELECT LCTR_SCHDLNM , CONCAT('(~ ', DATE_FORMAT(LCTR_EYMD, '%m.%d'), ')') AS LCTR_EYMD FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ = 13 AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} UNION ALL SELECT LCTR_SCHDLNM , CONCAT('(~ ', DATE_FORMAT(LCTR_EYMD, '%m.%d'), ')') AS LCTR_EYMD FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ = 14 AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} UNION ALL SELECT LCTR_SCHDLNM , CONCAT('(~ ', DATE_FORMAT(LCTR_EYMD, '%m.%d'), ')') AS LCTR_EYMD FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ = 15 AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ) A ) AA

/* SQL ID : ExamStareDAO.examStareByStdNo 설 명 : 특정 학습자 시험 응시 여부 */ SELECT (SELECT SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID) AS DGRS_YR , (SELECT FN_GET_ORG_CODE_NM(A.ORG_ID, 'DGRS_SMSTR', CRS_ID) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID) AS DGRS_SMSTR , A.TKEXAM_TYCD , CASE WHEN NVL((SELECT STARE_CNT FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID = #{stdNo}), 0) = 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS examStareYn FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.EXAM_ID = #{examCd}
